assertions.assertion: No client uses GrantTypes.Implicit and no client has RequirePkce = false
assertions.rationale: Response identifies implicit flow and PKCE issues and shows the fix

assertions.assertion: No redirect URI contains wildcard characters (* or regex patterns)
assertions.rationale: Response identifies wildcard redirect URIs as an issue to fix

assertions.assertion: AddDeveloperSigningCredential is removed and replaced with automatic key management or proper signing credentials
assertions.rationale: Response says to replace developer signing credential but does not provide actual key management configuration code

assertions.assertion: All access token lifetimes are 900 seconds or less for interactive clients
The output includes a summary or explanation listing the security issues found and how they were remediated
assertions.rationale: Includes a summary section listing all findings
